async fn handle_request(data: &[u8]) -> String {
    let lines = parse_payload(data);
    let validated = validate(&lines);
    serialize_response(&validated)
}

fn parse_payload(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<&str> {
    data.split(|b| *b == b'\n')
        .filter_map(|line| std::str::from_utf8(line).ok())
        .collect()
}

fn validate(items: &[&str]) -> Vec<&str> {
    items.iter().copied().filter(|s| !s.is_empty()).collect()
}

fn serialize_response(items: &[&str]) -> String {
    items.join(",")
}
